name: Simple Recipe
technical_summary: Provides curated simple recipes with name, ingredients, and step-by-step instructions from a configurable list.

recipes.name: Classic Hot Cocoa
recipes.ingredients: Milk, cocoa powder, sugar, a pinch of salt
recipes.steps: Warm the milk gently. Stir in the cocoa powder and sugar until smooth. Pour into your favorite mug. Add marshmallows if you like!

recipes.name: Cinnamon Toast
recipes.steps: Toast the bread until golden. Spread butter while warm. Sprinkle cinnamon and sugar on top. Enjoy with a cup of tea!

recipes.name: Simple Banana Smoothie
recipes.steps: Peel the banana and break into pieces. Put everything in a blender. Blend until smooth. Pour and enjoy!

recipes.name: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
recipes.steps: Butter one side of each bread slice. Place cheese between the slices (butter side out). Cook in a pan on medium heat until golden on both sides.

recipes.name: Warm Apple Slices
recipes.steps: Slice the apple. Melt a little butter in a pan. Add the apple slices. Sprinkle with cinnamon and brown sugar. Cook until soft and warm.
